text: Evening, wanderer. The Rookery keeps a fire and a cup for anyone who pays in coin or quiet.
speaker: Bartender

text: Twelve districts, one city—Secundus swallows secrets faster than I pour ale. Veneficturis hears half of them before dawn.
speaker: Bartender

text: Those hooded patrons do not trade in gossip. If you are wise, you sip, you listen, and you do not ask their names.
speaker: Bartender

text: Now—wine, small beer, or just the warmth of the hearth?
speaker: Bartender
